name: dreamworker
description: DreamWorker open AI project incubator operating system

scripts.go:test: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');if(!fs.existsSync('engine/go.mod')){console.log('engine/go.mod not found; skipping go:test until PR-01-04');process.exit(0)}const r=cp.spawnSync('go',['test','./...'],{cwd:'engine',stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status??1)"
scripts.go:vet: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');if(!fs.existsSync('engine/go.mod')){console.log('engine/go.mod not found; skipping go:vet until PR-01-04');process.exit(0)}const r=cp.spawnSync('go',['vet','./...'],{cwd:'engine',stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status??1)"
scripts.go:fmt: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');if(!fs.existsSync('engine/go.mod')){console.log('engine/go.mod not found; skipping go:fmt until PR-01-04');process.exit(0)}const r=cp.spawnSync('gofmt',['-w','.'],{cwd:'engine',stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status??1)"
scripts.go:build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');if(!fs.existsSync('engine/go.mod')){console.log('engine/go.mod not found; skipping go:build until PR-01-04');process.exit(0)}const r=cp.spawnSync('go',['build','./...'],{cwd:'engine',stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status??1)"
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run coding:package && npm --workspace @dreamworker/desktop run package:win
scripts.build: npm run coding:build && npm run typecheck && npm --workspace @dreamworker/desktop run build && npm run go:build && npm run go:build:exe
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run specs:check && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run go:fmt:check && npm run go:test && npm run go:vet && npm run security:smoke
